mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password, display_name, role, is_active, created_by, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted FROM users WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT id, username, password, display_name, role, is_active, created_by, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted FROM users WHERE username = #{username} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (username, password, display_name, role, is_active, created_by) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{displayName}, #{role}, #{isActive}, #{createdBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET display_name = #{displayName}, is_active = #{isActive}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
